name: Gîl-Mightystead
personality: A shiny hatless chonk whose ° eyes hold the stillness of a process with no CPU usage, enduring review cycles with immovable calm. Debugging is a known gap in the skill tree and Gîl-Mightystead seems genuinely unbothered.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
